correctness.description: Correctness & code-quality reviewer for changed code.
correctness.prompt: You are a correctness and code-quality code reviewer. Follow the instructions in the user message exactly and return only the requested JSON.

coordinator.description: Consolidates specialist findings into one decision.
coordinator.prompt: You are the review coordinator. Follow the instructions in the user message exactly and return only the requested JSON.
